envelope.codeInvalid: Hmm, we don't recognize that code. Check your invitation and try again.
envelope.publicTeaser: Something beautiful is being written. If you hold an invitation, break the seal.

hero.line1: Some letters carry news. This one carries our whole hearts.
hero.line2: We are getting married, and we cannot imagine the day without you.
hero.dateHidden: The date is a secret the letter will reveal soon.

story.title: Our Story
story.intro: Every love letter needs a beginning. Ours started like this...

chapters.title: The First Hello
chapters.body: [EDIT ME] It began with an ordinary day that refused to stay ordinary. A chance meeting, a first conversation that ran long past its welcome, and two people who didn't quite want to say goodbye.

chapters.title: The Falling
chapters.body: [EDIT ME] Somewhere between late-night phone calls and shared plates of food, 'you' and 'me' quietly became 'us'. We stopped counting dates and started counting on each other.

chapters.title: The Question
chapters.body: [EDIT ME] Then came the question — four small words, one shaking voice, and a yes that was never in doubt.

chapters.title: The Next Chapter
chapters.body: And now we're writing the best part — and we want you in it.

details.title: The Details
details.venueHidden: Somewhere beautiful — we'll whisper the address soon.

schedule.event: Dancing until the ink runs dry

details.hotelsIntro: A few places we love, close to the celebration:
details.spotsIntro: If you're making a weekend of it, don't miss these:

rsvp.title: Write Back to Us
rsvp.intro: Every letter deserves a reply. This one especially.
rsvp.qAttending: Will you be there when we say 'I do'?
rsvp.aYes: Wouldn't miss it for the world
rsvp.qParty: How many of you will be joining us?
rsvp.qSong: What song will get you on the dance floor?
rsvp.qMessage: Any words for the two of us?
rsvp.messagePlaceholder: Write us a little letter of your own...
rsvp.thanksYes: Your reply is sealed and on its way to our hearts. See you there!
rsvp.thanksNo: We'll miss you dearly — but you'll be with us in spirit. Thank you for writing back.
rsvp.errorGeneric: The ink smudged — please try sending again.

guestbook.title: Notes Pinned to Our Letter
guestbook.intro: Leave a note, a wish, or a word of advice for the road ahead.
guestbook.thanks: Your note is pinned. Thank you!
guestbook.empty: The board is waiting for its very first note.
guestbook.errorGeneric: The pin slipped — please try again.

gallery.title: The Photographs
gallery.coupleIntro: A few moments we've tucked between the pages.
gallery.guestsIntro: Now it's your turn — add the moments you captured.
gallery.uploadThanks: Received! Your photos will appear once we've had a peek.
gallery.comingSoonPhotos: We're tucking the photographs in — check back soon.
gallery.uploadError: Some photos didn't make it — try those again.
gallery.invalidToken: This upload link isn't valid. Ask the couple for a fresh one.

quiz.title: How Well Do You Know Us?
quiz.intro: Eight questions. No pressure. Eternal glory on the leaderboard.

questions.q: [EDIT ME] Where did we first meet?
[EDIT ME] What's our go-to late-night food?

quiz.errorGeneric: The ink smudged — please try again.
quiz.emptyLeaderboard: No champions yet — be the first.

faq.title: P.S. — The Practical Bits

items.a: [EDIT ME] Formal attire. Think elegant — you'll want to look good in the photos, because there will be many.

items.q: Can I bring the little ones?
items.a: [EDIT ME] We love your kids, and this note will tell you whether it's a grown-ups' evening or a family affair.
[EDIT ME] Parking details will appear here once the venue is revealed.

items.q: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
items.a: [EDIT ME] We'd love your eyes, not your screens, during the ceremony — our photographer has it covered. Afterward, snap away.
Your presence is the truest gift. If you insist, our registry is just below.

faq.registryIntro: [EDIT ME] Truly — you being there is everything. For those who insist:

signature.closing: With all the love ink can hold,
signature.postscript: P.S. You found the end of the letter. But did you find everything hidden inside it?
